description: Binary market on a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire by March 31, 2026. At 0.5% with $28.3M in volume, this is one of Polymarket's deepest markets. Resolves in 6 days. Part of a temporal cluster with April, June, and year-end deadlines.
question: Will Russia and Ukraine reach a ceasefire by March 31, 2026?

resolution_logic.summary: Resolves Yes if an official ceasefire agreement — a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in military engagement — is reached between Russia and Ukraine by March 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET. The agreement must be reached by the deadline; the ceasefire itself can start later.

triggers.description: Official ceasefire agreement announced by both Russia and Ukraine, or consensus of credible media reporting
triggers.source: Official announcements from Russia and Ukraine

exclusions: Ceasefires limited to energy infrastructure, Black Sea, or similar partial agreements
Peace frameworks without explicit dated commitment to stop fighting
resolution_logic.ambiguity_notes: Must be a general pause in the conflict. A peace deal qualifies only if it includes a publicly announced halt in military engagement effective on a specific date.

cross_platform_link.structural_notes: Kalshi does not have a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire market. Coverage gap — Polymarket dominates geopolitical event markets.

related_markets.notes: Ceasefire by April 30 at 3.9% — one-month extension of the same question
Ceasefire by June 30 at 15% — three-month extension
Russia-Ukraine ceasefire before US-Iran ceasefire at 14% — relative timing market
